description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after a large, round, and friendly creature with a soft, plush brown body and a cream-colored belly adorned with a pattern of dark gray chevrons. Its face features wide, circular eyes with black pupils, a small triangular nose, and a gentle, smiling mouth. The toy has two prominent, pointed ears with tufts at the base, and three thin, black whiskers on each cheek. Its arms are short and stubby, extending outward, while its legs are small and slightly pointed. A thick, rounded tail protrudes from the back, and the hands and feet are tipped with small, white claws. The overall appearance is inviting and whimsical, making it suitable for children or as a decorative plush in urban parks or homes.
description: A large, round, brown stuffed toy with a cream belly, pointed ears, whiskers, and a friendly, smiling face. It features stubby limbs, a thick tail, and a whimsical, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smiling face, cream belly with chevron markings, outstretched arms, and visible claws.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the round body, protruding tail, and profile of the face and ear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid brown back, both ears, and the full tail, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, ear, and tail, with the cream belly partially visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and welcoming, with wide, open eyes, a small triangular nose, and a gentle, smiling mouth. The eyebrows are slightly arched, enhancing the cheerful appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms extended outward and legs slightly apart, the head facing forward and the tail protruding behind.
